markdown:
Share

[Donate](https://www.gofundme.com/f/loss-of-mother-to-covid19-james-drayton/donate?source=btn_donate_sticky)

**Stephanie Miller**

![](https://images.gofundme.com/hUhT42rGnvSQzwurHVd04CkurKI=/1200x900/https://d2g8igdw686xgo.cloudfront.net/61664485_1638467451147872_r.jpeg)

Donation protected

My name Stephanie and I am creating this GoFundMe page on behalf of James Drayton.

It’s unfortunate that I’m having to type this but as we all know Raysheena Tuck passed on 11/25/21 due to COVID-19 and she leaves behind her one and only son who she loved so dearly.

King James as she called him, is a Junior at Hough High school.

James loves to play piano, weld, and ride horses. He also loves his family and being apart of the Hough High Community.

During this hard time, we all know the holidays are approaching, and expenses will continue to come.

Many people have inquired about how they can support James during this time.

This would be a great way to start him off on the right foot. There are a few items that he will need as he continues throughout the school year.

Thank you for all of your kindness, if you are not able give your prayers will be greatly appreciated.

Show your support for this GoFundMe

[Donate](https://www.gofundme.com/f/loss-of-mother-to-covid19-james-drayton/donate?source=btn_story_donate) Share

## Your easy, powerful, and trusted home for help

- ### Easy



Donate quickly and easily

- ### Powerful



Send help right to the people and causes you care about

- ### Trusted



Your donation is protected by the [GoFundMe Giving Guarantee](https://www.gofundme.com/c/safety/gofundme-guarantee)
